title: Stair geometry diagram
text: stair geometry diagram: side profile showing maximum riser 7 3/4 in, minimum tread 10 in, headroom 6 ft 8 in, and handrail height 34 to 38 in (IRC R311.7).
description: Side profile of a residential stair with riser, tread, headroom, and handrail dimensions.

title: Deck ledger attachment diagram
text: deck ledger attachment diagram: cross-section of a ledger fastened to the house band joist with staggered lag bolts and flashing shedding over the ledger (IRC R507.9).
description: Cross-section of a deck ledger with staggered fasteners, flashing, joist hanger, and a lateral-load note.

title: Egress opening diagram
text: egress opening diagram: net clear opening with minimum width 20 in, minimum height 24 in, 5.7 sq ft area, and maximum sill 44 in (IRC R310).
description: An egress window showing the net clear opening minimums and maximum sill height.

title: Wall framing layout diagram
text: wall framing layout diagram: elevation with studs 16 in on center, double top plate, bottom plate, and a header on king and jack studs (IRC R602).
description: Elevation of a framed wall with studs at 16 in on center, plates, and a header over an opening.

title: R-value by climate zone diagram (FL and NC)
text: R-value by climate zone diagram: Florida zones 1 to 2 and North Carolina zones 3A to 5A with prescriptive ceiling and wall R-value ranges.
description: Schematic of FL and NC climate zones with prescriptive ceiling, wall, and floor R-value ranges.
attribution: Original Creator OS drawing (CC0); values from the public-domain DOE Building America restatement.

title: DOE Building America Solution Center guide diagrams (public domain)
description: Public-domain step-by-step trade diagrams (insulation, air sealing, foundations, roofs, ducts). Downloadable into the local library by tools/construction_fetch.py; per-image credit lines mark any third-party image.
attribution: U.S. DOE / PNNL Building America Solution Center (public domain); check each image caption for a third-party credit.

title: AWC DCA6 deck figures (link only, copyrighted)
description: Authoritative deck detail figures and span tables in the AWC DCA6 guide. Copyrighted: linked, never reproduced or committed.
attribution: American Wood Council DCA6 (copyrighted); reference by figure, do not reproduce.

title: ICC IRC figures (link only, copyrighted)
description: Figures within the International Residential Code. Copyrighted: linked to the free viewer, never reproduced or committed.
attribution: International Code Council (copyrighted); cite by figure number, read in the free viewer.

title: Wikimedia Commons construction details (per-file CC/PD)
description: Construction detail images on Wikimedia Commons. Reusable per-file only after recording the exact license and attribution here before bundling.
attribution: Per Wikimedia Commons file page; record the license and author before use.
